◎简　　介  

　　By revealing the surprising links between human History and Deep Time, this series in 4K shows how our civilization and innovations are driven not only by decisions we make or victories on the battlefield, but by Physics, Geology, Biology, Chemistry - by forces so far back in time, that the formation of our planet secretly shaped the stories we thought we knew.Epic, cinematic ...
